title: APEX-DAG Settings
description: Configuration for the APEX-DAG JupyterLab extension.

greedyNotebookExtraction.title: Exhaustive Context Capture
greedyNotebookExtraction.description: When enabled, the engine treats the notebook as a sequential script (top-to-bottom). When disabled, the engine strictly respects the Kernel execution state and ignores unexecuted cells.

rawDatasetPath.title: Labeling Dataset Root
rawDatasetPath.description: The workspace-relative directory used by the 'Next' notebook iterator to stream unannotated assets.

replaceDataflowInUDFs.title: UDF Scope Inlining
replaceDataflowInUDFs.description: When enabled, the refiner will attempt to inline the internal dataflow of User Defined Functions into the main dataflow and lineage graph.

highlightRelevantSubgraphs.title: Deterministic Lineage Pruning
highlightRelevantSubgraphs.description: Aggressively removes topological paths that do not contribute to a Dataset, Model, or Environment Export, leaving only the core lineage chain.

useGraphRefiner.title: Post-Inference Heuristic Refiner
useGraphRefiner.description: Applies a deterministic rule-engine after neural classification to ensure logical consistency in the final graph topology.

llmClassification.title: Neural Lineage Inference
llmClassification.description: Toggle between inference engines. When enabled, a Large Language Model (LLM) handles classification; when disabled, the system utilizes the local GAT backend.

debounceDelay.title: Analysis Throttle (ms)
debounceDelay.description: Cooldown period before graph re-computation. Use -1 to disable debouncing and trigger updates immediately upon cell execution.
